framing: Full-Stack Software Engineer targeting Senior role

jd.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer

requirements.text: 5+ years of professional software engineering experience
Strong proficiency in TypeScript and React
Experience building and maintaining production APIs (REST or GraphQL)
Experience with CI/CD pipelines and automated testing
Familiarity with cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
Experience with payment systems or financial technology
BS or MS in Computer Science or related field

responsibilities: Design and implement full-stack features for Stripe's merchant dashboard
Build and maintain RESTful APIs serving millions of requests per day
Collaborate with product managers and designers to ship user-facing features
Write comprehensive unit and integration tests
Participate in code reviews and contribute to engineering best practices
Mentor junior team members and contribute to technical documentation

expected_output.summary: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 6 years of experience building production web applications using TypeScript, React, and Node.js. Track record of delivering user-facing features at scale, maintaining RESTful APIs handling 500K+ daily requests, and improving CI/CD pipeline reliability. BS Computer Science with hands-on experience in PostgreSQL, AWS, and automated testing.

experience.title: Software Engineer II
bullets: Built and maintained full-stack features for financial data aggregation platform using TypeScript, React, and Node.js
Designed RESTful APIs serving 500K+ daily requests with 99.9% uptime SLA
Reduced API response latency by 35% through database query optimization and Redis caching
Mentored 2 junior engineers through onboarding and code review processes
Implemented comprehensive integration test suite covering 85% of critical payment flows

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Developed merchant-facing dashboard features using React and GraphQL
Built automated CI/CD pipeline reducing deployment time from 45 minutes to 12 minutes
Contributed to checkout flow optimization resulting in 8% conversion rate improvement
Wrote technical documentation for API integration guides used by 200+ partners

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern — 3 terms
bullets: Wealthsimple: Built transaction categorization pipeline using Python and PostgreSQL
Shopify (1st term): Developed internal admin dashboard components in React
Faire: Built REST API endpoints for supplier onboarding flow

education: BS Computer Science — University of Waterloo (2015-2019)

deliberate_flaws: No direct payment processing/gateway experience (Plaid is data aggregation, not payment processing)
Intern experience is thin — only 2 bullets

provenance.notes: Synthetic persona and JD. JD style modeled from real Greenhouse/Lever postings. Expected output and cloud_skills are AI-generated. 4/8 scorecard checks (jd_coverage, no_fabrication, metrics_preserved, no_fabricated_skills) evaluate AI vs AI reference. 4/8 checks (factual_preservation, word_count, ats_structure, action_verbs) are structurally valid regardless.
